export function createInvalidObservableTypeError(input) { return new TypeError("You provided " + (input !== null && typeof input === 'object' ? 'an invalid object' : "'" + input + "'") + " where a stream was expected. You can provide an Observable, Promise, ReadableStream, Array, AsyncIterable, or Iterable."); } //# sourceMappingURL=throwUnobservableError.js.map
